Content: It looks like you have Sprint Reloaded installed. Unfortunately Misc. Bits & Bobs and Sprint Reloaded edit the same values when modifying player speed and are incompatible with each other. The player side of Misc. Bits & Bobs will be disabled. Porter speed should be unaffected.
DebugWarning: Please note you have debug mode turned on. It isn't recommended to leave this on unless you have a purpose for it.
EvictConfirmText: The game may appear to hang while all the visitors are evicted. It has not crashed. Continue?
Title: Mod Incompatibility Detected
cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write detailed diagnostic info to the BepInEx log while you play. Turn this on before reporting a bug.
cfg.quiet_music_in_gui.name: Quiet Music In GUI
cfg.quiet_music_in_gui.desc: On: the music drops in volume whenever you open an in-game menu so it does not drown out the UI. Off: music stays at full volume during menus.
cfg.condense_xp_bar.name: Condense XP Bar
cfg.condense_xp_bar.desc: On: the red/green/blue XP numbers on the HUD compact to a shorter form once they hit four digits (for example 12450 shows as 12.4K). Off: the full numbers are shown.
cfg.hide_credits_button_on_main_menu.nam: Hide Credits Button On Main Menu
cfg.hide_credits_button_on_main_menu.des: On: the Credits button is removed from the main menu. Off: the Credits button is visible as normal.
cfg.remove_cinematic_letterboxing.name: Remove Cinematic Letterboxing
cfg.remove_cinematic_letterboxing.desc: On: the black bars shown during cutscenes (sermons, cinematics) are removed so the full screen stays visible. Off: cutscenes play with the original letterboxing.
cfg.halloween_now.name: Halloween Now
cfg.halloween_now.desc: On: the Halloween event runs year-round. Off: the event is limited to its normal late-October schedule.
cfg.skip_intro_video_on_new_game.name: Skip Intro Video On New Game
cfg.skip_intro_video_on_new_game.desc: On: the opening cinematic is skipped when you start a new game and you drop straight into play. Off: the intro video plays as normal.
cfg.lessen_footprint_impact.name: Lessen Footprint Impact
cfg.lessen_footprint_impact.desc: On: new footprints are drawn at roughly half their normal dirt intensity so trails look subtler. Off: footprints leave the game default amount of dirt.
cfg.remove_prayer_on_use.name: Remove Prayer On Use
cfg.remove_prayer_on_use.desc: On: each prayer item is consumed when you pray, so stockpiled prayers become single-use. Off: prayers stay in your inventory after praying like they normally do.
cfg.add_coal_to_tavern_oven.name: Add Coal To Tavern Oven
cfg.add_coal_to_tavern_oven.desc: On: the tavern oven accepts coal as a fuel source alongside its normal firewood. Off: only the vanilla fuel is accepted.
Add Zombies To Pyre And Crematorium
On: working zombies and bodies can be loaded into the pyre and crematorium for disposal. Off: only the vanilla inputs are accepted.
cfg.modify_player_movement_speed.name: Modify Player Movement Speed
cfg.modify_player_movement_speed.desc: On: the player walking speed is scaled by the multiplier below. Off: the player moves at the game default speed.
cfg.player_movement_speed.name: Player Movement Speed
cfg.player_movement_speed.desc: How much faster the player walks when the toggle above is on. 1 is vanilla speed, 2 is twice as fast, and so on. Do not combine with other speed mods.
cfg.modify_porter_movement_speed.name: Modify Porter Movement Speed
cfg.modify_porter_movement_speed.desc: On: porter (backpack-wearing zombie worker) walking speed is overridden by the multiplier below. Off: porters move at their normal game speed.
cfg.porter_movement_speed.name: Porter Movement Speed
cfg.porter_movement_speed.desc: How fast porters walk when the toggle above is on. 1 is their vanilla speed.
cfg.evict_all_church_visitors.name: Evict All Church Visitors
cfg.evict_all_church_visitors.desc: Click to force any stuck church visitors to leave immediately. Use this when villagers have lingered inside and are blocking the pulpit or benches.
cfg.kitsunekito_mode.name: KitsuneKito Mode
cfg.kitsunekito_mode.desc: A Discord-requested tweak: adding the basic wooden fence to a grave drops a single blue XP orb. Off by default.
cfg.old_english_throwback.name: Old English Throwback
cfg.old_english_throwback.desc: A Discord-requested tweak: changes the sermon line "Our church is great!" to "Our church great!" in English. Has no effect in other languages.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
